message:
fix(tests): remove incorrect singleton reset in agent-events test

The test was attempting to reset `globalThis.__agentEventsService` but
the actual service uses a module-scoped `serviceInstance` variable.
This reset code was misleading and did nothing - removed it since
tests create new instances directly rather than using the singleton.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
